title: From mummification to the afterlife: Immersive ancient Egypt exhibition opens in Victoria
description: A new Royal BC Museum exhibition is giving visitors an immersive, sensory look at how ancient Egyptians understood death as part of a continued journey into another existence.

title: Clean energy COP hits fossil fuel phase-out demands
description: Electrification and clean energy have been foregrounded by the Australian leader of international climate negotiations as a prominent green group demands progress on a fossil fuels transition.
